description: Traditional, polished, structured. Best for large corporates, banks, government institutions.

examples.title: Formal Application for Graduate Programme at Standard Chartered Bank
examples.body:
15 June 2026

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my sincere interest in the Graduate Trainee Programme advertised by Standard Chartered Bank Zambia. As a recent Bachelor of Commerce graduate from the University of Zambia, I have developed a strong foundation in financial analysis, risk management, and corporate governance that aligns with your institution's reputation for excellence.

During my industrial attachment at the Bank of Zambia, I gained hands-on experience in regulatory compliance and financial reporting. I assisted in preparing quarterly compliance reports and identified discrepancies in loan portfolio data, resulting in a 12% improvement in reporting accuracy. This experience taught me the importance of precision and integrity in financial operations.

My academic coursework in advanced corporate finance, combined with my proficiency in Excel, Python, and financial modelling, positions me to contribute meaningfully to your team from day one. I am particularly drawn to Standard Chartered's commitment to sustainable finance and would welcome the opportunity to support your ESG initiatives.

I am confident that my analytical skills, professional discipline, and enthusiasm for banking would make me a valuable addition to your graduate programme. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Yours sincerely,

Chanda Mutale

examples.title: Formal Industrial Attachment Application at Zesco Limited
examples.body:
3 March 2026

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to apply for the position of Industrial Attachment Student in the Electrical Engineering Department at Zesco Limited. I am currently in my third year of study at Copperbelt University, pursuing a Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering.

Throughout my academic journey, I have maintained a consistent academic record, achieving a cumulative GPA of 3.7. My coursework in power systems, electrical machines, and renewable energy has provided me with the theoretical knowledge necessary for practical application in your esteemed organisation. Additionally, I have completed coursework in project management and occupational health and safety, both of which are critical in large-scale utility operations.

During my previous attachment at a private electrical firm in Kitwe, I assisted in conducting load assessments for commercial buildings and contributed to the design of a small-scale solar installation for a rural health centre. This experience reinforced my commitment to engineering excellence and community service.

I am eager to bring my technical knowledge, problem-solving abilities, and dedication to Zesco Limited. I am available for a twelve-month attachment commencing in June 2026.

I look forward to the possibility of contributing to your engineering team.

Yours faithfully,

Lungowe Kabwe

examples.title: Formal Cover Letter for IT Graduate Programme at MTN Zambia
examples.body:
22 April 2026

Dear Recruitment Team,

Please accept my application for the IT Graduate Programme at MTN Zambia. I hold a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from the University of Zambia, graduating with distinction, and I am passionate about leveraging technology to drive business transformation.

My final year project focused on developing a machine learning model to predict network congestion patterns in telecommunications infrastructure. Using Python, TensorFlow, and real-world datasets, I achieved 87% prediction accuracy, which demonstrated both my technical capabilities and my understanding of the telecommunications sector's operational challenges.

Beyond technical skills, I have cultivated strong communication and teamwork abilities through my role as President of the Computer Science Society, where I organised hackathons and coding workshops for over 200 students. I believe these leadership experiences have prepared me to collaborate effectively within cross-functional teams.

MTN's investment in digital innovation and network expansion across Zambia resonates deeply with my career aspirations. I am excited about the prospect of contributing to your technology team and growing within an organisation that values both innovation and community impact.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Yours sincerely,

Blessings Mwila
